name: Fit-Line Global
message: Fit-Line Global® is a trusted supplier, designer, research and development resource for SEMI-F57-0301 compliant PFA and PVDF components. They employ efficient manufacturing processes to create products that meet the most demanding applications. Fit-Line Global has been a trusted supplier to the semiconductor industry for more than 25 years. Headquartered in California, Fit-Line Global dedicates itself to providing quality products, with the fastest lead time in the industry, at a fair price. The company exclusively produces ultra-high purity PFA and PVDF components to eliminate the possibility of cross-contamination.
